summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADLTrack Care Operating System with new Gemini Studio AI components. All core features working correctly including Landing Page navigation, Caregiver Dashboard (shift management, tasks, vitals, AI copilot), Family Dashboard (vitals, timeline, navigation, AI copilot), and Sign Out flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally intercepts clicks on bottom nav buttons
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True in Playwright or JavaScript click() bypasses the issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with ADLTrack branding and hero section
Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows navigation options (Family Portal, Caregiver App, Agency Dashboard)
Clicking 'Caregiver App' from mobile menu navigates to Caregiver Dashboard
Clicking 'Family Portal' from mobile menu navigates to Family Dashboard
Caregiver Dashboard: Shows 'You're Offline' state with Start Shift button (data-testid='start-shift-btn')
Caregiver Dashboard: Patient name 'David Smith' displayed correctly
Caregiver Dashboard: Start Shift button works and transitions to active shift state
Caregiver Dashboard: Vitals cards display correctly (BP: 120/76, HR: 72 bpm, Temp: 98.6°F)
Caregiver Dashboard: Today's Plan tab shows 12 tasks with correct priorities (CRITICAL, STANDARD, QUALITY_OF_LIFE)
Caregiver Dashboard: Requests tab shows 2 proposed tasks from family (Extra Walk in Garden, Video Call with Grandchildren)
Caregiver Dashboard: Task card expands when clicked showing Instructions, Time Window, and Start Task button
Caregiver Dashboard: AI Copilot opens when bot button clicked (data-testid='copilot-btn')
Caregiver Dashboard: AI Copilot shows greeting with patient name and input field
Caregiver Dashboard: Bottom navigation works (Home, Chats, Shift, Settings)
Caregiver Dashboard: Settings tab shows Profile, Earnings, Shift History, Settings, Support options
Caregiver Dashboard: Profile page shows caregiver info (Julia Martinez, CNA, 4.9 rating, 234 shifts)
Family Dashboard: Vitals cards display correctly (BP, HR, Temp, Pain - 4 cards)
Family Dashboard: Care Timeline section exists with 'Today's completed tasks' label
Family Dashboard: Bottom navigation works (Activity, Messages, Notifications, Settings)
Family Dashboard: Messages tab shows conversations (Family Group, Julia Martinez, Tom Smith)
Family Dashboard: AI Copilot opens when bot button clicked (data-testid='family-copilot-btn')
Family Dashboard: AI Copilot shows family-specific greeting
Sign out flow works - clicking Sign Out from Profile returns to Sign In page with role selection
seed_data_creation: None - app uses mocked data from mockData.js

mocked_apis_list: Vitals data mocked (INITIAL_VITALS - BP, HR, Temp, Pain)
AI Copilot uses fallback responses if Gemini API unavailable

context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard components tested at mobile viewport (430x932). Landing page navigation, Caregiver Dashboard (shift start, tasks, vitals, copilot), Family Dashboard (vitals, timeline, messages, copilot), and sign out flow all working. Minor Emergent badge overlay issue on bottom nav - use force=True for clicks. AI Copilot integrates with backend /api/copilot/chat endpoint using Gemini via emergentintegrations.
